title: Link cards to ewsr1-fli1-knowledge-graph entities
context: Backlog/future: interoperate the cards with the ewsr1-fli1-knowledge-graph project via normalized HGNC/SO/Mondo references. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Link cards to ewsr1-fli1-knowledge-graph entities via normalized HGNC/SO/Mondo references, producing a mapping that interoperates without copying restricted content.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards linked to ewsr1-fli1-knowledge-graph entities via normalized HGNC/SO/Mondo references
Interop mapping carries provenance and copies no restricted-source content; validated on fixtures
